items.title_en: 'It's just scale': Local mom-and-pop car dealerships are growing or dying amid industry consolidation, rise of mega-retailers
items.title_zh: “这只是规模”：随着行业整合和大型零售商的崛起，当地夫妻汽车经销商正在成长或消亡
items.desc_en: Multibillion-dollar dealerships have been on the rise amid a decadeslong consolidation that has led to a grow-or-die mentality for many U.S. auto retailers.
items.desc_zh: 经过数十年的整合，价值数十亿美元的经销商不断增加，这导致许多美国汽车零售商抱有“要么成长，要么灭亡”的心态。

items.title_en: Nvidia's once-tight bond with gamers is cracking over AI, 'and that breaks my heart'
items.title_zh: 英伟达与游戏玩家一度紧密的关系因人工智能而破裂，“这让我心碎”
items.desc_en: Gamers once helped save Nvidia from bankruptcy. Now they feel left behind as the memory crunch drives focus to AI chips and DLSS 5 disrupts game design.
items.desc_zh: 游戏玩家曾经帮助英伟达免于破产。现在，由于内存紧缺促使人们将注意力集中在 AI 芯片上，而 DLSS 5 扰乱了游戏设计，他们感觉自己被落在了后面。

items.title_zh: Tinder 和 Zoom 提供“人性证明”眼部扫描来对抗人工智能
items.desc_en: The tech aims to identify people's irises and stop the rise of fake accounts and malicious scams.
items.desc_zh: 该技术旨在识别人们的虹膜并阻止虚假账户和恶意诈骗的兴起。

items.title_en: Widow, 86, back in France after being held by ICE
items.title_zh: 86 岁寡妇被 ICE 拘留后返回法国
items.desc_en: Marie-Thérèse had moved to the US after reuniting with her long-lost love, an American man who died in January.
items.desc_zh: 玛丽-泰蕾兹在与失散多年的爱人（一名于一月份去世的美国男子）重聚后移居美国。

items.title_en: Irish fugitive and suspected crime boss Daniel Kinahan arrested in Dubai
items.title_zh: 爱尔兰逃犯、犯罪嫌疑人丹尼尔·基纳汉在迪拜被捕
items.desc_en: Kinahan, in his 40s, was arrested in Dubai on foot of an arrest warrant issued by the Irish courts.
items.desc_zh: 40 多岁的基纳汉根据爱尔兰法院发出的逮捕令在迪拜被捕。

items.title_en: Thousands celebrate open-air Mass with Pope Leo in Cameroon - in pictures
items.title_zh: 数千人在喀麦隆与教皇利奥一起庆祝露天弥撒 - 图片中
items.desc_en: Pope Leo XIV is on his third day in Cameroon before he heads to Angola on Saturday.
items.desc_zh: 教皇利奥十四世已经是在喀麦隆的第三天了，他将于周六前往安哥拉。

items.desc_en: The company's claim the AI tool can outperform humans at some hacking and cyber-security tasks has sparked fears in the financial world.
items.desc_zh: 该公司声称人工智能工具可以在某些黑客和网络安全任务上超越人类，这引发了金融界的担忧。

items.desc_zh: Meta 和 YouTube 等公司的高管将被问到他们正在采取哪些措施来保护儿童。

items.title_zh: Booking.com 客户被黑客攻击后收到“预订劫持”警告
items.desc_en: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.
items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站

items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.title_en: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 一名男子被指控在袭击 OpenAI 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 家时企图谋杀
items.desc_en: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。

items.title_zh: 量子计算：欧洲可以赢得科技竞赛吗？

items.desc_zh: 凭借该领域一些有前景的计算公司，欧洲能否成为量子技术的领导者？

items.title_en: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.title_en: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
items.title_zh: GTA 制作商 Rockstar Games 再次遭到黑客攻击，但淡化影响
items.desc_en: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.
items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss Sam Altman's home targeted with Molotov cocktail
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的家遭到燃烧弹攻击
items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.
items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。
